description: User uploads test-resume.pdf and verifies it appears in the documents list

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3002/auth/login and log in with qa-test-journeyhawk@phronex.com / HMqt4kH5loXkeAtvQSndQ7zNmow!Phx#9. Wait for the dashboard to load.
Navigate to http://localhost:3002/jp/documents. Note the exact number of documents currently listed (could be 0 or more).
Click the Upload button or file upload CTA on the documents page. A file input dialog or upload form should appear.

Upload the file at path './fixtures/test-resume.pdf' (relative to the test runner working directory). If a file chooser dialog is triggered by Playwright, use it to select that file. Submit / confirm the upload.

Wait up to 10 seconds for the upload to complete. Verify: does a document named 'test-resume' or 'test-resume.pdf' now appear in the documents list? The count should have increased by 1 from what you noted in step 2.

Check for error messages or console errors. If the upload succeeded and the document appears: find and delete the just-uploaded 'test-resume.pdf' to clean up test data; confirm it is removed. PASS if the full upload-verify-delete cycle works. FAIL if the upload button is missing, the file is rejected, or the document does not appear after upload. Screenshot.
